# The L0 Guy

> Technical content that turns protocols into integrations. A writer who understands protocol internals AND can write them clearly — for the developers and the coding agents now building from docs.

Name: The L0 Guy (handle). Two years inside LayerZero (Legend role, community council member). Builder of OFT Sentinel.
Site: https://damli40.github.io/thel0guy/

## Offer

Technical content for crypto-infrastructure teams: I make complex protocol mechanics impossible to misunderstand — for the humans reading the docs and for the coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor) that now fetch those docs to write integrations. Single conversion action: get in touch.

## Why teams bring me in (value props)

1. Your docs are now read by agents, not just developers. A growing share of integrations start with someone pointing a coding agent at your docs; if that surface is ambiguous, the agent doesn't bounce — it ships the wrong config. I write docs both humans and agents parse correctly, and structure the agent-readable layer so the right integration gets generated. (This is the core differentiator.)
2. Your docs are your developer funnel. The hardest part of infra growth is getting people to understand the tech well enough to build on it. I write the explainer that turns "I don't get it" into "I shipped it."
3. I'm the rare overlap. Engineers who understand the protocol usually can't write; writers who can write usually don't understand it. I do both, with two years of public proof.
4. I translate infra into capital and adoption. My work has made fee-switch dynamics, DVN economics, and omnichain trust legible to thousands of sophisticated readers.

## Proof

- OFT Sentinel — an autonomous trust-intelligence agent and the entire narrative around it; top 120 of 576 in Mantle's Turing Test Hackathon. The README and product are a writing sample: complex security mechanics, made clear. https://oft-sentinel.netlify.app
- The fee switch as a governance weapon — surfaced a competitive war most ZRO holders never saw. https://x.com/rookie_of_Ph/status/2013626693873783041
- DVNs are the ISPs of crypto — reframed a $100M infrastructure opportunity in one analogy. https://x.com/rookie_of_Ph/status/2001921578393833861
- Stats: 2 years as a top LayerZero voice; single posts regularly clearing thousands of views; top 120 of 576 at the Mantle hackathon.

## What I deliver

Integration & developer guides; protocol docs; technical explainers; agent-readable doc structure (llms.txt / clean reads); strategic research content.
